Operation.Caption: 上引采购申请
Operation.Action: IIFS(DocumentTypeID<=0, ConfirmMsg('MM_PURCHASEORDER001','请先输入单据类型',{}, 'OK'), PurchasingOrganizationID<=0, ConfirmMsg('MM_PURCHASEORDER002','请先输入采购组织',{}, 'OK'), true, Macro_ShowLeadPurRequisition())

Operation.Caption: 上引采购合同
Operation.Action: IIFS(DocumentTypeID<=0, ConfirmMsg('MM_PURCHASEORDER001','请先输入单据类型',{}, 'OK'), PurchasingOrganizationID<=0, ConfirmMsg('MM_PURCHASEORDER002','请先输入采购组织',{}, 'OK'), true, Macro_ShowLeadPurcContract())

Operation.Caption: 上引询价单
Operation.Action: IIFS(DocumentTypeID<=0, ConfirmMsg('MM_PURCHASEORDER001','请先输入单据类型',{}, 'OK'), PurchasingOrganizationID<=0, ConfirmMsg('MM_PURCHASEORDER002','请先输入采购组织',{}, 'OK'), true, Macro_ShowLeadRFQ())

DataBinding.CheckRule: IIFS(com.bokesoft.erp.documentNumber.DocumentNumber.docNumberFieldEnable('DocumentNumber')&&DocumentNumber=='', '采用外部给号编码规则，请输入代码', true, true)
IIF(GetDictValue('MM_DocumentType', DocumentTypeID, 'Control')=='T',true,IIF(VendorID<=0,MessageFacade('06049','请输入供应商'),true))

FilterValue.ParaValue: IIF(PurchasingOrganizationID>0, 'OID IN ( Select BK_Vendor.OID FROM BK_Vendor left join EMM_Vendor_PurchasingOrgDtl on BK_Vendor.SOID = EMM_Vendor_PurchasingOrgDtl.SOID where EMM_Vendor_PurchasingOrgDtl.PurchasingOrganizationID='&SqlPara(PurchasingOrganizationID)& ')', '1=2')

IIFS(IsPushedPurchaseContract==0,' OID in (SELECT ch.SOID FROM ECM_PurchaseContractHead ch left join ECM_PC_SubjectMatterDtl ep on ch.OID = ep.SOID where ep.SOID is null)',true,'1=1')&' and VendorID='&SqlPara(VendorID)&' and CompanyCodeID='&SqlPara(CompanyCodeID)

DataBinding.CheckRule: IIF(GetDictValue('MM_DocumentType',DocumentTypeID,'IsSynergismSRM')==1&&PurchaseEmployeeID==0,MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER006','请输入采购方负责人'),'')
IIFS(GetDictValue('MM_DocumentType', DocumentTypeID, 'Control')=='T'&&SupplyingPlantID<=0, MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER005','请输入供货工厂'), true, true)

DataBinding.DefaultFormulaValue: IIFS(GetDictValue('MM_DocumentType', DocumentTypeID, 'Control')=='T', GetDictValue('CompanyCode', CompanyCodeID, 'CurrencyID'), true, Macro_GetOrgProp('VendorID', 'TVIPurchase_OrderCurrencyID', PurchasingOrganizationID))

DataBinding.CheckRule: IIFS(DaysCount1<0,MessageFacade('00126','请仅指定正值'),DaysCount1>=0&&DaysCount2==0&&DaysCount3==0&&DiscountPercentage1>=0&&DiscountPercentage2==0,true,(DaysCount3==0||DaysCount3>DaysCount2)&&DaysCount2>DaysCount1,true,true,MessageFacade('06178','请按升序输入天数'))

IIFS(DaysCount2<0,MessageFacade('00126','请仅指定正值'),DaysCount1>=0&&DaysCount2==0&&DaysCount3==0&&DiscountPercentage1>=0&&DiscountPercentage2==0,true,(DaysCount3==0||DaysCount3>DaysCount2)&&DaysCount2>DaysCount1,true,true,MessageFacade('06178','请按升序输入天数'))

IIFS(DaysCount3<0,MessageFacade('00126','请仅指定正值'),DaysCount1>=0&&DaysCount2==0&&DaysCount3==0&&DiscountPercentage1>=0&&DiscountPercentage2==0,true,(DaysCount3==0||DaysCount3>DaysCount2)&&DaysCount2>DaysCount1,true,true,MessageFacade('06178','请按升序输入天数'))

IIFS(DiscountPercentage1<0,MessageFacade('00126','请仅指定正值'),DaysCount1>=0&&DaysCount2==0&&DaysCount3==0,true,DiscountPercentage1<DiscountPercentage2||(DiscountPercentage1==0&&DiscountPercentage2==0),MessageFacade('06180','请按降序输入百分比'),true,true)

IIFS(DiscountPercentage2<0,MessageFacade('00126','请仅指定正值'),DaysCount1>=0&&DaysCount2==0&&DaysCount3==0,true,DiscountPercentage1<DiscountPercentage2||(DiscountPercentage1==0&&DiscountPercentage2==0),MessageFacade('06180','请按降序输入百分比'),true,true)

FilterValue.ParaValue: 'NodeType='&SqlPara(1)&' AND SOID IN (SELECT GroupPaymentTermID FROM EFI_PaymentTerm WHERE IsVendor='&SqlPara(1)&')'

DataBinding.CheckRule: IIFS(PaymentTermID>0&&ActualPaymentTermID==0, MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER007','未设置对应截止日支付条件明细'), true, true)
IIFS(PC_PaymentProportion<0||PC_PaymentProportion>100, MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER008','付款比例不正确'), true, true)

FilterValue.ParaValue: 'NodeType='&SqlPara(1)&' AND SOID IN (SELECT GroupPaymentTermID FROM EFI_PaymentTerm WHERE IsVendor='&SqlPara(1)&')'

DataBinding.CheckRule: IIF(GetDictValue('VendorAccountGroup',GetDictValue('Vendor',VendorID,'VendorAccountGroupID'),'IsOneTimeAccountGroup')==0||Length(City)>0||VendorID<=0,true,MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER054','请输入一次性供应商城市'))

IIF(GetDictValue('VendorAccountGroup',GetDictValue('Vendor',VendorID,'VendorAccountGroupID'),'IsOneTimeAccountGroup')==0||Length(VendorName)>0||VendorID<=0,true,MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER053','请输入一次性供应商名称'))

IIF(GetDictValue('VendorAccountGroup',GetDictValue('Vendor',VendorID,'VendorAccountGroupID'),'IsOneTimeAccountGroup')==0||AddressCountryID>0||VendorID<=0,true,MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER055','请输入一次性供应商国家'))
IIFS(GetDictValue('MM_DocumentType', DocumentTypeID, 'Code')=='F-FO'&&ValidStartDate<=0, MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER009','请输入有效起始日期'), true, true)
IIF(GetDictValue('MM_DocumentType',DocumentTypeID,'IsSynergismSRM')==1&&IsSRMSupplier==1&&Length(Provider)==0,MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER010','必填'),true)

Dict.Caption: 采购订单类型对应的伙伴方案

GridColumn.Caption: 已下推采购收货基本数量
已下推采购收货基本数量351
已下推外向交货数量STO(过账)
已经开票数量(2-贷项发票)
已经开票数量(3-后续借记)
已经开票数量(4-后续贷记)
已经下推内向交货单数量

DataBinding.CheckRule: IIFS(GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='D', IIFS(AccountAssignmentCategoryID>0, true, true, MessageFacade('ME017','服务类别D一定要和科目分配类别一起使用')), (SupplyingPlantID>0||SupplyingPlantID>0)&&AccountAssignmentCategoryID>0&&GetDictValue('AccountAssignmentCategory', AccountAssignmentCategoryID, 'InternalCode')=='M', MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER011','转储业务不允许科目分配为M'), AccountAssignmentCategoryID<=0&&com.bokesoft.erp.mm.purchase.PurchaseOrderFormula.plantIsNotValuated(MaterialID,PlantID), MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER012','零价值工厂必须选择科目分配类别'), true, true)

FilterValue.ParaValue: IIFS(ItemCategoryID>0, 'soid in (select AccountAssignmentCategoryID From EMM_CombinItemCatAccAssCat where ItemCategoryID='&SqlPara(ItemCategoryID)&')', true, '')

DataBinding.ValueChanged: Macro_GenPriceProcedure();IIF(GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='C',SetValue('IsFree',1,true),true);IIFS(GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='D', SetValue('Quantity', 1,true));Macro_ExplodeBOMByNoCheckRow();if (GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='D') {IIFS(MaterialID>0, SetValue('MaterialID', 0));SetValue('IsReturnItem', 0);ClearAllRows('AccountAssignDtl')} else {true};IIFS(GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='K'||GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='U', SetValue('IsSubcontractVendor', 0,false));IIF(GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='K',SetValue('IsReturnItem', false),'');
DataBinding.CheckRule: IIFS(ItemCategoryID<=0, MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER013','项目类别不能为空！'), com.bokesoft.erp.mm.purchase.PurchaseOrderFormula.checkItemCategory(SupplyingPlantID,ItemCategoryID), true, true, true)

FilterValue.ParaValue: IIF(DocumentTypeID>0,'soid in (select ItemCategoryID from EMM_DocumentTypeDtl where soid='&SqlPara(DocumentTypeID)&')','')

DataBinding.CheckRule: IIFS(PlantID<=0, MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER014','请输入工厂!'), SupplyingPlantID>0&&com.bokesoft.erp.mm.stock.STOFormula.checkCustomer4STO(PlantID)&&com.bokesoft.erp.mm.stock.STOFormula.checkSaleArea4STO(SupplyingPlantID), true, true, true)
com.bokesoft.erp.mm.purchase.PurchaseOrderFormula.checkMaterial(Dtl_OID)

FilterValue.ParaValue: IIF(PlantID>0, 'OID IN ( Select SOID from EGS_Material_Plant where PlantID='&SqlPara(PlantID)&' And Status_Purchase='&SqlPara(1)&' And Status_Plant IN('&SqlPara(0)&','&SqlPara(1)&') )', '1=2')

IIF((Dtl_IsReturnToVendor||Macro_IsSTO())&&SupplyingPlantID>0 && SaleOrganizationID>0, 'OID IN ( Select SOID FROM EGS_Material_SD where SaleOrganizationID='&SqlPara(SaleOrganizationID)&' And DistributionChannelID='&SqlPara(DistributionChannelID)&' And Status_VSD='&SqlPara(1)&' And Status_SD IN('&SqlPara(0)&','&SqlPara(1)&') )', '1=1')
IIF(PlantID>0,'OID IN (select SOID from EGS_MaterialValuationArea where Status_FI = '&SqlPara(1)&' and ValuationAreaID= '&SqlPara(PlantID)&' )','1=2')

GridCell.Caption: 订单数量
GridCell.Enable: IIFS(GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='D', false, DeliveryLineCount>1, false, true, !ReadOnly())

DataBinding.CheckRule: if (Quantity<=0) {MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER052','订单数量大于0')} else {if ((Quantity<PushedGRQuantity+PushedGRQuantity103-PushedGRQuantity105+PushedGRQuantity107-PushedGRQuantity109-PushedGRQuantity124-Quantity*OverDeliveryLimitPercentage)&&(IsDeliveryUnlimited!=1)) {MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER051','订单数量不能小于已收货数量')} else {true}}
IIFS(!GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='D'&&UnitID<=0, MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER016','请输入订单单位'), true, true)
DataBinding.DefaultFormulaValue: IIFS(GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='D', com.bokesoft.erp.mm.purchase.PurchaseOrderFormula.getUnitDefaultVaues(PurchasingOrganizationID), GetDictValue('MM_DocumentType', DocumentTypeID, 'Control')=='T', GetDictValue('Material', MaterialID, 'BaseUnitID'), PurchaseInfoRecordID>0&&GetDictValue('MM_PurchaseInfoRecord', PurchaseInfoRecordID, 'MaterialID')!=0, GetDictValue('MM_PurchaseInfoRecord', PurchaseInfoRecordID, 'PurchaseUnitID'), PurchaseInfoRecordID>0&&MaterialID==0,GetDictValue('MM_PurchaseInfoRecord', PurchaseInfoRecordID, 'PurchaseUnitID'),GetDictValue('Material', MaterialID, 'OrderUnitID')>0, GetDictValue('Material', MaterialID, 'OrderUnitID'), MaterialID>0, GetDictValue('Material', MaterialID, 'BaseUnitID'), true, UnitID)

DataBinding.CheckRule: IIF(PurchaseInfoRecordID>0 && DeliveryDate>0,com.bokesoft.erp.mm.purchase.PurchaseOrderFormula.checkPurchaseInfoRecordID(PurchaseInfoRecordID,DeliveryDate),'')

IIFS(GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='U'||GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='K'||GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='C'||IsFree==1, true, Price<=0, MessageFacade('06218','净价必须大于0'), true, true)

DataBinding.DefaultFormulaValue: IIFS(GetDictValue('MM_DocumentType', DocumentTypeID, 'Control')=='T', GetDictValue('CompanyCode', CompanyCodeID, 'CurrencyID'), true, CurrencyID)

DataBinding.CheckRule: IIF(GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='U'||GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='C',true,IIF(PriceUnitID>0,true,MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER017','价格单位不能为空')))

IIFS(GetDictValue('MM_DocumentType', DocumentTypeID, 'Control')=='T'&&IsReturnItem==1&&STOType==3, MessageFacade('ME020','转储订单不允许退货'), GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='L'&&IsReturnItem==1, MessageFacade('ME548','外协加工项目不允许退货'), true, true)

GridCell.Caption: 评估类型
GridCell.Enable: IIFS(!Macro_IsSplitValuation(), false, Macro_ValuationTypeIsGRIR(), false, Macro_MaterialBatchCodeIsExist(), false, !ReadOnly()&&com.bokesoft.erp.mm.function.SplitValuationFormula.getValuationCategoryPropValue(Macro_GetOrgProp2AllowNull('MaterialID', 'GlobalCategoryID', PlantID, 0),'IsExtPOMandatory',PlantID)==0, !ReadOnly(), true, false)

DataBinding.CheckRule: IIFS(!Macro_IsSplitValuation(), true, GetDictValue('MM_DocumentType', DocumentTypeID, 'Control')=='T'&&GlobalValuationTypeID<=0, MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER018','请输入评估类型'), com.bokesoft.erp.mm.function.SplitValuationFormula.getValuationTypePropValue(GlobalValuationTypeID,'ExternalPOAllowed',PlantID)==2, MessageFacade('ME074','外部采购订单未被允许'), true, IIF(Length(BatchCode)>0&&BatchCode!='_'&&GlobalValuationTypeID<=0&&!Macro_AutoSetValuationType(),MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER018','请输入评估类型'),true))

DataBinding.DefaultFormulaValue: IIFS(GetDictValue('Material', MaterialID, 'MinimumRemainingShelfLife')>0, GetDictValue('Material', MaterialID, 'SLEDPeriodIndicatorID'), GetDictValue('Material', MaterialID, 'MinimumRemainingShelfLife')==0,GetDictOID('MM_SLEDPeriodIndicator', 'Code', 'D'))

GridCell.Caption: 发票收据
GridCell.Enable: IIFS(GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='D', false, !Macro_PushedEdtitable(), false, AccountAssignmentCategoryID>0, GetDictValue('AccountAssignmentCategory', AccountAssignmentCategoryID, 'IsInvoiceReceiptFirm')==0&&!ReadOnly(), true, !ReadOnly())

DataBinding.DefaultFormulaValue: IIFS(IsFree==1, 0, GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='D', 1, ItemCategoryID>0, GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'IsPOItemLinkedInvoice'), AccountAssignmentCategoryID>0, GetDictValue('AccountAssignmentCategory', AccountAssignmentCategoryID, 'IsInvoiceReceipt'), true, 1)

DataBinding.CheckRule: IIFS(IsGRInvoiceVerification==1, IIF(IsInvoiceReceipt==0||IsGoodsReceipt==0,'如果是基于收货的发票校验，请勾选收货和发票收据标示。',true), true, true)
IIF(GetDictValue('Procedure', PricingProcedureID, 'IsIncludeTax')==1&&TaxCodeID<=0&&IsFree==0,MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER019','使用含税定价过程时税码不能为空'),true)
IIF(GRVendorID<=0&&IsSubcontractVendor==1,MessageFacade('06763','请输入交货地址中的供应商'),true)
IIF(GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='S'&&DeliveryCustomerID<=0,MessageFacade('ME394','请输入客户'),true)

DataBinding.DefaultFormulaValue: IIFS(GRVendorID>0, GetDictValue('Vendor', GRVendorID, 'Name'), DeliveryCustomerID>0, GetDictValue('Customer', DeliveryCustomerID, 'Name'), true, GetDictValue('Plant', PlantID, 'Name'))

IIFS(GRVendorID>0, GetDictValue('Vendor', GRVendorID, 'StreetAddress'), DeliveryCustomerID>0, GetDictValue('Customer', DeliveryCustomerID, 'StreetAddress'), true, GetDictValue('Plant', PlantID, 'StreetAddress'))

IIFS(GRVendorID>0, GetDictValue('Vendor', GRVendorID, 'RoomNumber'), DeliveryCustomerID>0, GetDictValue('Customer', DeliveryCustomerID, 'RoomNumber'), true, GetDictValue('Plant', PlantID, 'RoomNumber'))

IIFS(GRVendorID>0, GetDictValue('Vendor', GRVendorID, 'PostalCode'), DeliveryCustomerID>0, GetDictValue('Customer', DeliveryCustomerID, 'PostalCode'), true, GetDictValue('Plant', PlantID, 'PostalCode'))
IIFS(GRVendorID>0, GetDictValue('Vendor', GRVendorID, 'City'), DeliveryCustomerID>0, GetDictValue('Customer', DeliveryCustomerID, 'City'), true, GetDictValue('Plant', PlantID, 'City'))
IIFS(GRVendorID>0, GetDictValue('Vendor', GRVendorID, 'CountryID'), DeliveryCustomerID>0, GetDictValue('Customer', DeliveryCustomerID, 'CountryID'), true, GetDictValue('Plant', PlantID, 'CountryID'))
IIFS(GRVendorID>0, GetDictValue('Vendor', GRVendorID, 'RegionID'), DeliveryCustomerID>0, GetDictValue('Customer', DeliveryCustomerID, 'RegionID'), true, GetDictValue('Plant', PlantID, 'RegionID'))

DataBinding.CheckRule: IIFS(IsEstimatedPrice==1, IIF(IsGoodsReceipt==0,MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER020','在选择了GR非估价的情况下，需要选择收货'),true), true, true)

GridCell.Caption: 科目分配
GridCell.Enable: IIFS(GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='D', false, Macro_IsFromSaleOrder(), false, true, !ReadOnly())

DataBinding.CheckRule: IIF(AccountAssignmentMean>0&&InvoiceAssignment==0,MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER021','请选择按顺序或按比例或按金额分配'),true)
DataBinding.DefaultFormulaValue: IIFS(GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='D', 2, AccountAssignmentMean==0, 0, true, GetDictValue('AccountAssignmentCategory', AccountAssignmentCategoryID, 'PartialInvoice'))

DataBinding.CheckRule: IIF(STOType>3&&SupplyingPlantID>0&&PlantID>0&&SaleOrganizationID<=0,MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER022','STO业务需要维护对应的销售组织'),true)
IIF(STOType>3&&SupplyingPlantID>0&&PlantID>0&&DistributionChannelID<=0,MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER023','STO业务需要维护对应的分销渠道'),true)
IIF(STOType>3&&SupplyingPlantID>0&&PlantID>0&&DivisionID<=0,MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER024','STO业务需要维护对应的产品部门'),true)
IIF(STOType>3&&SupplyingPlantID>0&&PlantID>0&&LoadingGroupID<=0,MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER025','STO业务需要维护装载组'),true)
IIF(Macro_IsSTO()&&STOType>3&&ShippingPointID<=0,MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER026','STO业务需要维护装运点'),true)
IIF(STOType>3&&SupplyingPlantID>0&&PlantID>0&&CustomerID<=0,MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER027','STO业务需要维护对应的客户'),true)

DataBinding.DefaultFormulaValue: IIFS(IsSubcontractVendor==1&&GRVendorID>0, 'O', GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='K', 'K',GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='C', 'B', GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='L'&&GetDictValue('AccountAssignmentCategory', AccountAssignmentCategoryID, 'Code')!='Q', 'O', GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='L'&&GetDictValue('AccountAssignmentCategory', AccountAssignmentCategoryID, 'Code')=='Q', 'Q',AccountAssignmentCategoryID>0, GetDictValue('AccountAssignmentCategory', AccountAssignmentCategoryID, 'SpecialIdentity'), true, '_')

DataBinding.CheckRule: IIFS(GetDictValue('AccountAssignmentCategory', AccountAssignmentCategoryID, 'Code')=='Q'&&GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='L'&&WBSElementID==0, '请输入WBS要素', true, true)

DataBinding.DefaultFormulaValue: IIF(IsFMActive, Macro_GetDerivationValue(Dtl_CompanyCodeID, 'CommitmentItemID', 'IIF(AccountAssignmentCategoryID==0, Macro_GetCommitmentItemIDByMaterialInfo(Dtl_CompanyCodeID, PlantID, MaterialID, MaterialGroupID), Macro_GetOrgProp("GLAccountID", "CommitmentItemID", Dtl_CompanyCodeID))'), CommitmentItemID)

IIFS(MaterialID<=0, 0, IsReturnItem==1, 0, PurchaseInfoRecordID>0, Macro_GetPurchaseInfoRecordOrgPropAllowNull('SetConfirmationControlID'), true, Macro_GetOrgPropAllowNull('VendorID', 'TVIPurchase_SetConfirmationControlID', PurchasingOrganizationID))

GridCell.Caption: 已下推采购收货基本数量
已下推采购收货基本数量351
已下推外向交货数量STO(过账)
已经开票数量(2-贷项发票)
已经开票数量(3-后续借记)
已经开票数量(4-后续贷记)
已经下推内向交货单数量

DataBinding.CheckRule: IIFS(OverallLimitMoney<0, MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER030','请仅指定正值'), GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')!='D'||AccountAssignmentCategoryID<=0||IsNoLimit==1, true, ActualMoney>0&&OverallLimitMoney<ActualMoney, MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER028','总体限制的设定值不能低于当前实际值'), UnplanMoney>0&&OverallLimitMoney<=0, MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER029','请输入一总体限制或不进行限制'), true, true)

IIFS(UnplanMoney<0, MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER030','请仅指定正值'), GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')!='D'||AccountAssignmentCategoryID<=0||GetRowCount('PurchaseOrderDtl')>0||(IsNoLimit==0&&OverallLimitMoney<=0), true, UnplanMoney<=0, MessageFacade('SE999','输入期望值'), true, true)

DataBinding.DefaultFormulaValue: IIF(GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='K' || GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='L' || GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='B' || GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='D' || GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='U', 0, IsOriginAcceptance)

FilterValue.ParaValue: 'soid in (SELECT soid FROM BK_Unit WHERE UnitSystemID IN (SELECT soid FROM BK_UnitSystem WHERE UnitLength = '&SqlPara(3)&' or UnitMass = '&SqlPara(1)&' or IsNonSystem = '&SqlPara(1)&'))'

Grid.Caption: 交货计划

FilterValue.ParaValue: 'soid in (SELECT soid FROM BK_Unit WHERE UnitSystemID IN (SELECT soid FROM BK_UnitSystem WHERE UnitLength = '&SqlPara(3)&' or UnitMass = '&SqlPara(1)&' or IsNonSystem = '&SqlPara(1)&'))'

Grid.OnRowDelete: if (DS_ReceivedQuantity>0) {ConfirmMsg('MM_PURCHASEORDER050','存在收货数量，不能删除。',{}, 'OK'); return 0;} else {if (GetRowCount('DeliveryPlanDtl')==1) {ConfirmMsg('MM_PURCHASEORDER031','需要保留一行计划行数据。',{}, 'OK'); return 0;} else {DeleteRow();Macro_ChangeConditionQuantity()}};

DataBinding.CheckRule: IIFS(PlanDeliveryDays__mirror>999,MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER056','不能超过999天'), true, true)
IIFS(ReceiptProcessDays__mirror>999, MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER056','不能超过999天'), true, true)

IIFS(ToInt(IsEstimatedPrice__mirror1)==1&&AccountAssignmentCategoryID>0&&GetDictValue('AccountAssignmentCategory', AccountAssignmentCategoryID, 'IsGoodsReceiptFirm')==0&&ToInt(IsGoodsReceipt__mirror)==0, MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER020','在选择了GR非估价的情况下，需要选择收货'), true, true)

Dict.Caption: 评估类型
Dict.Enable: IIFS(!Macro_IsSplitValuation(), false, Macro_ValuationTypeIsGRIR(), false, Macro_MaterialBatchCodeIsExist(), false, !ReadOnly()&&com.bokesoft.erp.mm.function.SplitValuationFormula.getValuationCategoryPropValue(Macro_GetOrgProp2AllowNull('MaterialID', 'GlobalCategoryID', PlantID, 0),'IsExtPOMandatory',PlantID)==0, !ReadOnly(), true, false)

SubDetail.Caption: 条件技术价格计算过程

FlexFlowLayoutPanel.Caption: 条件技术价格计算过程

DataBinding.CheckRule: IIFS(SA_GLAccountID>0&&GetDictValue('Account', SA_GLAccountID, 'NodeType')!=0, '不能选择汇总节点', !PA_AssetCardSOID>0&&SA_GLAccountID<=0, MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER034','请输入总账科目'),(SA_CostCenterID>0||SA_WBSElementID>0||SA_NetworkID>0||SA_DynOrderID>0)&&(Macro_GetCostElementSA()==0 || GetDictValue('CO_CostElement', Macro_GetCostElementSA(), 'ValidStartDate')>DocumentDate || GetDictValue('CO_CostElement', Macro_GetCostElementSA(), 'ValidEndDate')<DocumentDate),MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER058','为 {1} 创建科目 {2} 作为控制范围 {3} 中成本要素',UTCDateFormat(DocumentDate,'yyyy-MM-dd'),GetDictValue('Account', SA_GLAccountID, 'UseCode'),GetDictValue('ControllingArea', SA_ControllingAreaID, 'Code')), true, true)

FilterValue.ParaValue: IIF(GetDictValue('CompanyCode', CompanyCodeID, 'AccountChartID')>0,' AccountChartID='&SqlPara(GetDictValue('CompanyCode', CompanyCodeID, 'AccountChartID'))&' And soid IN(SELECT soid from EFI_Account_CpyCodeDtl where CompanyCodeID='&SqlPara(CompanyCodeID)&') ',' soid IN(SELECT soid from EFI_Account_CpyCodeDtl where CompanyCodeID='&SqlPara(CompanyCodeID)&') ')

DataBinding.CheckRule: IIFS(GetDictValue('AccountAssignmentCategory', AccountAssignmentCategoryID, 'Code')=='K', IIFS(SA_CostCenterID>0, true, true, MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER035','请输入成本中心')), true, true)
IIFS(GetDictValue('AccountAssignmentCategory', AccountAssignmentCategoryID, 'InternalCode')=='A', IIFS(SA_AssetCardSOID>0, true, true, MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER037','请输入资产')), true, true)

DataBinding.DefaultFormulaValue: IIF(IsFMActive, Macro_GetDerivationValue(Dtl_CompanyCodeID, 'SA_CommitmentItemID', 'IIF(AccountAssignmentCategoryID==0, Macro_GetCommitmentItemIDByMaterialInfo(Dtl_CompanyCodeID, PlantID, MaterialID, MaterialGroupID), Macro_GetOrgProp("SA_GLAccountID", "CommitmentItemID", Dtl_CompanyCodeID))'), SA_CommitmentItemID)

FilterValue.ParaValue: '(CommitmentItemType='&SqlPara(2)&' OR CommitmentItemType='&SqlPara(3)&') and IsPostOpen='&SqlPara(1)&' and FinancialBusiness='&SqlPara(30)

DataBinding.CheckRule: IIF(FinancialManagementAreaID>0&&IsFMActive>0&&Macro_IsFundActive()&&!Macro_IsAllowFundBlank(FinancialManagementAreaID,DocumentDate)&&FundID==0, MessageFacade('FM_ACCOUNTASSIGNELEBLANK001','后台配置中基金不允许为空'), true)

IIF(FinancialManagementAreaID>0&&IsFMActive>0&&Macro_IsFunctionAreaActive()&&!Macro_IsAllowFunctionalAreaBlank(FinancialManagementAreaID,DocumentDate)&&SA_FunctionalAreaID==0, MessageFacade('FM_ACCOUNTASSIGNELEBLANK002','后台配置中功能范围不允许为空'), true)
IIF(SA_EarmarkedFundVoucherSOID!=0&&SA_EarmarkedFundVoucherDtlOID==0,MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER040','未选择专项基金明细'),true)
IIFS(LA_GLAccountID>0&&GetDictValue('Account', LA_GLAccountID, 'NodeType')!=0, '不能选择汇总节点', !PA_AssetCardSOID>0&&LA_GLAccountID<=0, MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER034','请输入总账科目'), true, true)

FilterValue.ParaValue: IIF(GetDictValue('CompanyCode', CompanyCodeID, 'AccountChartID')>0,' AccountChartID='&SqlPara(GetDictValue('CompanyCode', CompanyCodeID, 'AccountChartID'))&' And soid IN(SELECT soid from EFI_Account_CpyCodeDtl where CompanyCodeID='&SqlPara(CompanyCodeID)&') ',' soid IN(SELECT soid from EFI_Account_CpyCodeDtl where CompanyCodeID='&SqlPara(CompanyCodeID)&') ')

DataBinding.CheckRule: IIFS(GetDictValue('AccountAssignmentCategory', AccountAssignmentCategoryID, 'Code')=='K', IIFS(LA_CostCenterID>0, true, true, MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER035','请输入成本中心')), true, true)
IIFS(GetDictValue('AccountAssignmentCategory', AccountAssignmentCategoryID, 'InternalCode')=='A', IIFS(LA_AssetCardSOID>0, true, true, MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER037','请输入资产')), true, true)

DataBinding.DefaultFormulaValue: IIF(IsFMActive, Macro_GetDerivationValue(Dtl_CompanyCodeID, 'LA_CommitmentItemID', 'IIF(AccountAssignmentCategoryID==0, Macro_GetCommitmentItemIDByMaterialInfo(Dtl_CompanyCodeID, PlantID, MaterialID, MaterialGroupID), Macro_GetOrgProp("LA_GLAccountID", "CommitmentItemID", Dtl_CompanyCodeID))'), LA_CommitmentItemID)

FilterValue.ParaValue: '(CommitmentItemType='&SqlPara(2)&' OR CommitmentItemType='&SqlPara(3)&') and IsPostOpen='&SqlPara(1)&' and FinancialBusiness='&SqlPara(30)

DataBinding.CheckRule: IIF(FinancialManagementAreaID>0&&IsFMActive>0&&Macro_IsFundActive()&&!Macro_IsAllowFundBlank(FinancialManagementAreaID,DocumentDate)&&FundID==0, MessageFacade('FM_ACCOUNTASSIGNELEBLANK001','后台配置中基金不允许为空'), true)

IIF(FinancialManagementAreaID>0&&IsFMActive>0&&Macro_IsFunctionAreaActive()&&!Macro_IsAllowFunctionalAreaBlank(FinancialManagementAreaID,DocumentDate)&&LA_FunctionalAreaID==0, MessageFacade('FM_ACCOUNTASSIGNELEBLANK002','后台配置中功能范围不允许为空'), true)
IIF(LA_EarmarkedFundVoucherSOID!=0&&LA_EarmarkedFundVoucherDtlOID==0,MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER040','未选择专项基金明细'),true)

ComboBox.Caption: 科目分配
ComboBox.Enable: IIFS(AccountAssignmentCategoryID<=0||GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='D', false,GetDictValue('AccountAssignmentCategory', AccountAssignmentCategoryID, 'InternalCode')=='M'||GetDictValue('AccountAssignmentCategory', AccountAssignmentCategoryID, 'InternalCode')=='Q'||GetDictValue('AccountAssignmentCategory', AccountAssignmentCategoryID, 'AccountAssignmentScreen')==1,false, Macro_IsFromSaleOrder(), false, true, !ReadOnly())

GridColumn.Caption: 源采购申请科目分配明细OID

DataBinding.CheckRule: IIFS(GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')!='D'&&PA_Quantity>Quantity,MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER041','数量不能大于订单数量'),true,LineCheck)

DataBinding.ValueChanged: IIFS(Quantity==0, true, BaseUnitDenominator==BaseUnitNumerator, true, true, SetValue('PA_Quantity', IIF(BaseUnitNumerator>0,PA_BaseQuantity*BaseUnitDenominator/BaseUnitNumerator,0)));

DataBinding.CheckRule: IIFS(GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')!='D' && (PA_Percentage<0||PA_Percentage>1),MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER042','百分比应该在0~1之间'),true,LineCheck)
IIFS(AccountAssignmentMean==3&&PA_Money>Dtl_NetMoney,MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER043','金额不能大于订单金额'))

IIFS(GetDictValue('AccountAssignmentCategory', AccountAssignmentCategoryID, 'Code')=='K'&&GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')!='D', IIFS(PA_CostCenterID>0, true, true, MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER035','请输入成本中心')), GetDictValue('AccountAssignmentCategory', AccountAssignmentCategoryID, 'Code')=='A'&&PA_CostCenterID>0&&(Macro_GetCostElement()==0||GetDictValue('CO_CostElement', Macro_GetCostElement(), 'CostElementCategory')!='90'), MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER057', '无法将资产余额表科目的成本要素过账到成本中心'), true, true)

IIFS(IsFMActive>0&&AccountAssignmentCategoryID==0, true, PA_GLAccountID>0&&GetDictValue('Account', PA_GLAccountID, 'NodeType')!=0, '不能选择汇总节点', !PA_AssetCardSOID>0&&PA_GLAccountID<=0, MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER034','请输入总账科目'), true, true)

FilterValue.ParaValue: IIF(GetDictValue('CompanyCode', CompanyCodeID, 'AccountChartID')>0,' AccountChartID='&SqlPara(GetDictValue('CompanyCode', CompanyCodeID, 'AccountChartID'))&' And soid IN(SELECT soid from EFI_Account_CpyCodeDtl where CompanyCodeID='&SqlPara(CompanyCodeID)&') ',' soid IN(SELECT soid from EFI_Account_CpyCodeDtl where CompanyCodeID='&SqlPara(CompanyCodeID)&') ')

DataBinding.CheckRule: IIFS((GetDictValue('AccountAssignmentCategory', AccountAssignmentCategoryID, 'InternalCode')=='P'||GetDictValue('AccountAssignmentCategory', AccountAssignmentCategoryID, 'InternalCode')=='Q')&&PA_WBSElementID<=0,MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER038','请输入WBS要素'),AccountAssignmentCategoryID>0 && PA_WBSElementID>0 && com.bokesoft.erp.mm.stock.MSEGFormula.checkProjectStock(AccountAssignmentCategoryID,PA_WBSElementID),MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER044','WBS要素 {1} 有不同的存货估价',GetDictValue('PS_WBSElement',PA_WBSElementID,'Code')))
IIFS(GetDictValue('AccountAssignmentCategory', AccountAssignmentCategoryID, 'InternalCode')=='A', IIFS(PA_AssetCardSOID>0, true, true, MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER037','请输入资产')), true, true)

IIFS((GetDictValue('AccountAssignmentCategory', AccountAssignmentCategoryID, 'Code')=='E'||GetDictValue('AccountAssignmentCategory', AccountAssignmentCategoryID, 'Code')=='M')&&PA_SrcSaleOrderDtlOID<=0, MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER045','销售订单-行号必须输入'), GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='S', true, true, true)

GridCell.Caption: 源采购申请科目分配明细OID

DataBinding.CheckRule: IIFS(IsFMActive>0&&PA_CommitmentItemID<=0,MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER046','科目分配页：承诺项目未输入'));
DataBinding.DefaultFormulaValue: IIF(IsFMActive, Macro_GetDerivationValue(Dtl_CompanyCodeID, 'PA_CommitmentItemID', 'IIF(AccountAssignmentCategoryID==0, Macro_GetCommitmentItemIDByMaterialInfo(Dtl_CompanyCodeID, PlantID, MaterialID, MaterialGroupID), Macro_GetOrgProp("PA_GLAccountID", "CommitmentItemID", Dtl_CompanyCodeID))'), PA_CommitmentItemID)

FilterValue.ParaValue: '(CommitmentItemType='&SqlPara(2)&' OR CommitmentItemType='&SqlPara(3)&') and IsPostOpen='&SqlPara(1)&' and FinancialBusiness='&SqlPara(30)

DataBinding.CheckRule: IIFS(IsFMActive>0&&PA_FundCenterID<=0,MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER047','科目分配页：基金中心未输入'),Macro_CheckCompanyCode(FundCenterID,CompanyCodeID),MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER048','该基金中心不能用于此公司代码'));

IIF(FinancialManagementAreaID>0&&IsFMActive>0&&Macro_IsFundActive()&&!Macro_IsAllowFundBlank(FinancialManagementAreaID,DocumentDate)&&PA_FundID==0, MessageFacade('FM_ACCOUNTASSIGNELEBLANK001','后台配置中基金不允许为空'), true)

IIF(FinancialManagementAreaID>0&&IsFMActive>0&&Macro_IsFunctionAreaActive()&&!Macro_IsAllowFunctionalAreaBlank(FinancialManagementAreaID,DocumentDate)&&PA_FunctionalAreaID==0, MessageFacade('FM_ACCOUNTASSIGNELEBLANK002','后台配置中功能范围不允许为空'), true)
IIF(PA_EarmarkedFundVoucherSOID!=0&&PA_EarmarkedFundVoucherDtlOID==0,MessageFacade('MM_PURCHASEORDER040','未选择专项基金明细'),true)

GridColumn.Caption: 订单价格单位交货成本数量
订单价格单位交货成本数量

DataBinding.DefaultFormulaValue: IIFS(HI_BillType==9 || GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='B' || (IsServiceInvoiceVerification==0 && GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='D'), 0, HI_ShortText == 'U' || HI_ShortText == 'L',-1*HI_Direction * HI_Quantity,true,HI_Direction * HI_Quantity)

IIFS(HI_BillType==9 || GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='B' || (IsServiceInvoiceVerification==0 && GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='D'), 0, true, HI_UnitID)

IIFS(HI_BillType==9 || HI_BillType==6 || HI_BillType==8 || GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='B' || (IsServiceInvoiceVerification==0 && GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='D'), 0, HI_ShortText == 'U' || HI_ShortText == 'L',-1*HI_Direction*HI_OrderUnitQuantity,true,HI_Direction*HI_OrderUnitQuantity)

GridCell.Caption: 订单价格单位交货成本数量
订单价格单位交货成本数量

DataBinding.DefaultFormulaValue: IIFS(HI_BillType==9 || HI_BillType==6 || HI_BillType==8 || GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='B' || (IsServiceInvoiceVerification==0 && GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='D'), 0,true,HI_OrderPriceUnitID)

Item.Caption: Tr./ev. 交货成本库存日志
Tr./ev. 有借方dl.描述的费用

DataBinding.DefaultFormulaValue: IIFS(HI_BillType==9 || GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='B' || (IsServiceInvoiceVerification==0 && GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='D'), 0, true, UnitID)

IIFS(HI_BillType==9 || HI_BillType==6 || HI_BillType==8 || GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='B' || (IsServiceInvoiceVerification==0 && GetDictValue('MM_ItemCategory', ItemCategoryID, 'Code')=='D'), 0,true,PriceUnitID)

FilterValue.ParaValue: IIF(SetConfirmationControlID>0, 'soid in (select ExternalConfirmCategoryID from EMM_SetConfirmationControlDtl where soid='&SqlPara(SetConfirmationControlID)&')', '1=2')
